TextArea

Multi-line text input using <lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"> Slyte DOM. States: Empty, Filled, Focus, Disabled, Error, Success, Resizable, With Counter.

Form Figma Synced 10 States × 1 Size
Default — Empty
Base
Optional helper text
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-placeholder="Enter text..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Description"
  lt-prop-appearance="box">
</lyte-input>
<div class="zc-textarea-footer">
  <span class="zc-textarea-hint">Optional helper text</span>
</div>
SCSS
/* lyte-input[type=textarea] renders internally as:
   lyte-input > label.lyteLabel + div.lyteField > textarea */
lyte-input .lyteField textarea {
  min-height: 80px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
}
Default — Without Helper Text
No Hint
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-placeholder="Add your comments here..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Comments"
  lt-prop-appearance="box">
</lyte-input>
Filled — Multi-line Content
Filled
Helper text goes here
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-value="Your content here..."
  lt-prop-rows="4"
  lt-prop-label="Description"
  lt-prop-appearance="box">
</lyte-input>
Focus — Click to See Blue Border + Shadow
Click to Focus
Click the textarea to see focus styling (blue border + shadow)
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-placeholder="Click here to see focus state..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Notes"
  lt-prop-appearance="box">
</lyte-input>
<!-- Focus state adds .lyteInputFocus class automatically -->
SCSS
/* Lyte auto-adds .lyteInputFocus on focus */
lyte-input.lyteInputFocus .lyteField {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05), 0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Disabled Empty
This field is disabled
Disabled Filled
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-placeholder="Enter address..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Address"
  lt-prop-appearance="box"
  lt-prop-disabled="true">
</lyte-input>
SCSS
/* Lyte auto-adds .lyteInputDisabled class */
lyte-input.lyteInputDisabled .lyteField {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
lyte-input.lyteInputDisabled .lyteField textarea {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  color: #9EA0A7;
}
Error — Validation Failed
Error Empty
This field is required
Error Filled
Minimum 50 characters required
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field zc-textarea-field-error">
  <lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
    lt-prop-placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
    lt-prop-rows="3" lt-prop-label="Bio"
    lt-prop-appearance="box"
    class="zc-input-error">
  </lyte-input>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint">This field is required</span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
lyte-input.zc-input-error .lyteField {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}
.zc-textarea-field-error .zc-textarea-hint {
  color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-default, #CC1914);
}
Success — Validated
Success
Looks good!
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-value="Your feedback..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Feedback"
  lt-prop-appearance="box"
  class="zc-input-success">
</lyte-input>
<div class="zc-textarea-footer">
  <span class="zc-textarea-hint" style="color: #078841;">Looks good!</span>
</div>
SCSS
lyte-input.zc-input-success .lyteField {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
Resizable — User Can Drag to Resize
Vertical Resize
Drag the corner to resize vertically
Both Directions
Resize in both directions
No Resize
Resize is disabled
HTML
<!-- Vertical resize -->
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea" lt-prop-rows="3"
  style="--lyte-textarea-resize: vertical;"></lyte-input>

<!-- Both directions -->
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea" lt-prop-rows="3"
  style="--lyte-textarea-resize: both;"></lyte-input>

<!-- No resize -->
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea" lt-prop-rows="3"
  style="--lyte-textarea-resize: none;"></lyte-input>
SCSS
/* Override textarea resize via CSS custom property */
lyte-input .lyteField textarea {
  resize: var(--lyte-textarea-resize, vertical);
}
With Counter — Character Limit
Empty Counter
Keep it brief 0/200
Partial Counter
62/200
Near Limit
Character limit almost reached 192/200
HTML
<lyte-input lt-prop-type="textarea"
  lt-prop-placeholder="Write a short bio..."
  lt-prop-rows="3"
  lt-prop-label="Short Bio"
  lt-prop-appearance="box"
  lt-prop-max-length="200">
</lyte-input>
<div class="zc-textarea-footer">
  <span class="zc-textarea-hint">Keep it brief</span>
  <span class="zc-textarea-counter">0/200</span>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-footer {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.zc-textarea-counter {
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #9EA0A7);
  margin-left: auto;
}
